relatedWork: Story 4 — Team Admin reviews team access requests
taskSummary: Fix the missing generated static HTML route for the Story 4 team access review page and harden the GOV.UK render workflow so future new generated pages are detected.

problem.rootCause: The render workflow used git diff --quiet, which ignored brand-new untracked generated files.

futureBehaviour: New registered Nunjucks pages create missing public/pages directory structures.
New generated index.html files are detected by git status --short.
The render workflow commits new generated static files back to the PR branch.
residualRisks: Validation has not been run in this connector context.
The GOV.UK render workflow may normalise generated markup if the committed output differs from renderer output.
